title: Chef Aid Can Opener, High Grade Stainless Steel Can, Tin, Jar And Bottle Opener, Manual Rotating Blade with Built in Hanging Loops - Dishwasher Safe
features: ESSENTIAL- The Chef Aid Stainless Steel Can Opener is a versatile and essential tool for any home cook who wants to quickly and easily open cans of all sizes
HIGH GRADE - Made from High Grade stainless steel, this can opener is durable and resistant to rust, ensuring that it will last for years to come
ERGONOMIC - The comfortable grip handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, allowing you to easily open cans with minimal effort and without causing strain on your hands
EFFORTLESS - The sharp cutting wheel effortlessly slices through the can lid, leaving a smooth and safe edge that won't cause any sharp or jagged edges
COMPACT - The compact and sleek design of this can opener makes it easy to store in your kitchen drawers or on a magnetic strip, helping you to save valuable counter space in your kitchen
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
